name: pneumoscope
description: Local-first chest X-ray pneumonia screening UI backed by a trained ResNet-50 Keras model.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/api run test && npm --prefix apps/web run test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/api run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm --prefix apps/api run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/api run test && npm --prefix apps/web run test && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/smoke-model.ps1
